query: double exposure ghostly silhouette overlapping portrait
message: sub:double_exposure — anti_aesthetic — overlapping ghostly portraits, doubled silhouettes, layered composites

response.objective_caption: A black and white photograph showing a person with blonde hair and a buttoned shirt overlapping with a tufted upholstered bench with a wooden backrest, set against a light-colored wall with horizontal wood trim.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A black and white double exposure photograph where a translucent, ghostly figure with blonde hair and a buttoned shirt overlaps with a tufted upholstered bench, creating an unsettling, spectral presence against a flatly lit wall with wood trim, evoking an atmosphere of unease and melancholy through the layered, ethereal composition.
